ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Dropdown Menu provides an accessible menu primitive, while destructive confirmation policy and pending trigger semantics remain consumer composition.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora preserves React Aria collection, typeahead, dismissal, focus return, locale, and layer ownership while offering a safer second activation for destructive items.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal Canvas control surfaces, precise Ink boundaries, strong label hierarchy, restrained Green state signals, the shared Violet focus seam, purposeful reduced motion, and corners bounded by shared control tokens.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora preserves React Aria collection, typeahead, dismissal, focus return, locale, and layer ownership while offering a safer second activation for destructive items.

disabledBehavior.ui: Confirmation copy and confirming item state are not rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: A destructive item activates on its first eligible selection.
disabledBehavior.events: No confirmation-only interception or second activation is required.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No confirmation label or confirmation-state announcement is exposed.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated native semantics, keyboard, focus, axe, narrow layout, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion evidence is current; the contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, and switch records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Controlled and uncontrolled opening, typeahead, keyboard traversal, dismissal, focus return, and both confirmed and direct destructive paths are covered.

parityEvidence.summary: Deterministic generation derives every package implementation byte from normalized canonical source and matches native and Shadcn payloads to the same consumer transform; the recorded exact-tarball Next.js and Vite package/source matrix passes.

blockers.summary: Contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, switch, and relevant device evidence is not yet recorded.

maturityAssessment.rationale: Deterministic delivery parity is verified, but the remaining interaction, lifecycle, browser, accessibility, scale, security, or release evidence recorded for this item is still insufficient for promotion.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn Button provides styled button variants and composes a spinner for loading.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora supplies a focus-retaining pending state that blocks duplicate activation while synchronizing visible loading, aria-busy, aria-disabled, and the accessible label.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal Canvas control surfaces, precise Ink boundaries, strong label hierarchy, restrained Green state signals, the shared Violet focus seam, purposeful reduced motion, and corners bounded by shared control tokens.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora supplies a focus-retaining pending state that blocks duplicate activation while synchronizing visible loading, aria-busy, aria-disabled, and the accessible label.

api.enableWhen: Set pending true and optionally provide pendingLabel.

disabledBehavior.ui: No loading indicator, pending label, or loading rail is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The native button remains normally activatable.
disabledBehavior.events: Consumer click handling is not intercepted by pending-state protection.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No pending aria-busy or pending aria-disabled output is emitted.

api.enableWhen: Use mode toolbar and supply a non-empty keyboardHint.

disabledBehavior.ui: No keyboard hint text is rendered.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The hint adds no behavior; group mode separately retains ordinary native tab stops.
disabledBehavior.events: No hint-specific event or focus handler is installed.

ordinaryShadcnBaseline.summary: Ordinary Shadcn provides the Button used for a copy action, while clipboard success, failure, fallback cleanup, and announced status are application work.

mergoraAdvantage.summary: Mergora owns explicit copying, copied, and failure feedback without moving focus and offers a bounded legacy fallback that can be disabled for stricter security policy.

visualSignature.summary: The component uses literal Canvas control surfaces, precise Ink boundaries, strong label hierarchy, restrained Green state signals, the shared Violet focus seam, purposeful reduced motion, and corners bounded by shared control tokens.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora owns explicit copying, copied, and failure feedback without moving focus and offers a bounded legacy fallback that can be disabled for stricter security policy.

disabledBehavior.ui: No fallback-specific UI is shown; unavailable clipboard access uses the normal error status.
disabledBehavior.behavior: The temporary textarea and execCommand recovery path are never created.
disabledBehavior.events: onCopy cannot report the fallback method and failure flows to onCopyError.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: No false success announcement is emitted when the Clipboard API is unavailable.

accessibilityEvidence.summary: Automated native semantics, keyboard, focus, axe, narrow layout, RTL, forced-colors, and reduced-motion evidence is current; the contract-required manual screen-reader, speech, and switch records remain incomplete.

interactionEvidence.summary: Clipboard success, fallback success and cleanup, strict no-fallback failure, pending focus retention, retry, status announcements, and keyboard activation are covered.

optionalEnhancements.summary: Mergora requires a localizable accessible label, preserves a 44 CSS-pixel target, and keeps an optional native tooltip separate from that required name.

disabledBehavior.ui: No tooltip text or title attribute is rendered by the component.
disabledBehavior.behavior: Hover and long-press do not gain component-owned tooltip behavior.
disabledBehavior.events: No tooltip event handlers are installed.
disabledBehavior.accessibility: The required label remains the accessible name with no tooltip contribution.

api.enableWhen: Set external true and provide non-empty externalContext text.
